title: Discovery in the Wastes
outline: Elena and her small expedition team discover the entrance to the Lost Temple hidden beneath the sands of the Wastes. After weeks of following cryptic clues from her uncle's journal, she finally locates the site. As they begin to carefully excavate the entrance, Elena realizes they're being watched - Cult of the Flame scouts have tracked them. She must decide whether to proceed immediately into the unknown temple or retreat and risk losing the location to the zealots.
additional_notes: This scene should establish the physical danger of the setting and set up the rivalry with the Cult. Include sensory details of the harsh desert environment. Elena should demonstrate both her expertise and her impulsiveness - she's brilliant but tends to rush forward without considering consequences. End on a cliffhanger as she makes her choice.
tone: Suspenseful with moments of wonder and discovery
